events.message: Finance paid an invoice from a supplier that does not, on reflection, exist.
A suspicious login was contained after requesting a meeting with itself.
An exposed service was found and politely asked to stop being exposed.
An order-system glitch shipped product to an address best described as theoretical.
The workbench controller is encrypting itself. Production is observing a moment of silence.
A supplier sent a firmware update with the confidence of someone who had not read it.
